prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约6730名，2023年骤降至约9728名（出现明显断档），2024年回升至约7967名，2025年物理类进一步回升至约7395名。近三年位次呈波动回升趋势，2025年基准约7395名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年50人，2023年50人，2024年45人，2025年45人，2026年45人。2026年计划与2025年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升：2021年第162名→2022年第146名→2023年第142名→2024年第134名→2025年第141名→2026年第134名，整体排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强；2022年声誉评价为中性/混合（投档线下降趋势引发关注，但学校正面回应维护形象）；2023年偏正面（食堂服务好、宿舍条件改善获好评）。抖音热度排名第86位（共106所），评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低。未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，畜牧学获评A等级，作物学获评A-等级，为该校王牌学科。招生专业中动物科学对应畜牧学A，生物科学、农学类相关专业可对应作物学A-，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，但四川农业大学以农林为特色，相关专业热度一般。宁夏2025年物理类考生约44491人，2026年总考生约66000人（不确定），按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算，2026年物理类考生约44550人，与2025年基本持平，竞争压力变化不大。；四川农业大学位于四川省成都市，属跨省招生。该校在宁夏招生计划稳定在45人左右，占该校全国总招生计划比例较小（约0.5%-1%），宁夏考生报考该校属于跨省求学，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动回升趋势（2023年断档后持续回暖）、2026年招生计划持平、学校软科排名稳步上升增强吸引力、考生规模基本稳定等因素，预计2026年竞争略有加剧，位次在2025年基准7395名基础上小幅前移。预测最低位次约7345名，区间6845-7845名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest rank for science was approximately 6730, dropping sharply to about 9728 in 2023 (showing a clear gap), then recovering to around 7967 in 2024, and further recovering to about 7395 in 2025 for the physics category. Over the past three years, the rank has shown a fluctuating upward trend, with a baseline of about 7395 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia for science/physics category: 50 in 2022, 50 in 2023, 45 in 2024, 45 in 2025, and 45 in 2026. The 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 162nd in 2021 → 146th in 2022 → 142nd in 2023 → 134th in 2024 → 141st in 2025 → 134th in 2026, reflecting an overall improvement in the university's comprehensive strength. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed (the downward trend in admission scores raised concerns, but the university's positive response maintained its image); in 2023, it was somewhat positive (good cafeteria service and improved dormitory conditions received praise). Douyin popularity ranking: 86th (out of 106), with an evaluation of "average," indicating moderately low exposure on short video platforms. No obvious admission gaps were recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science was rated A, and Crop Science was rated A-, which are the university's flagship disciplines. Among the enrollment majors, Animal Science corresponds to the A-rated Animal Science, and Biological Science and Agriculture-related majors can correspond to the A- rated Crop Science, which has some appeal for applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended in society, but Sichuan Agricultural University, with its focus on agriculture and forestry, has average popularity for related majors. In 2025, the number of physics category examinees in Ningxia was about 44,491, and in 2026, the total number of examinees is about 66,000 (uncertain). Based on the recent proportion of physics category examinees at about 67.5%, the estimated number of physics category examinees in 2026 is about 44,550, roughly the same as in 2025, with little change in competitive pressure. Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. Its enrollment plan in Ningxia is stable at around 45 students, accounting for a small proportion (about 0.5%-1%) of the university's total national enrollment plan. For Ningxia examinees, applying to this university involves studying in another province, and the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings (continuous recovery after the gap in 2023), the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the steadily rising Soft Science ranking enhancing the university's appeal, and the basically stable number of examinees, it is expected that competition will slightly intensify in 2026, with the rank moving slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 7395. The predicted minimum rank is about 7345, with a range of 6845-7845.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For ranks within the predicted range of 6845-7845, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6845), focus on reaching for popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Data Science and Big Data Technology. If the rank is in the middle of the range (about 7100-7500), prioritize cost-effective majors such as Animal Science (A-rated discipline in Animal Science) and Energy and Power Engineering. If the rank is close to the upper limit of the range (about 7600-7845), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety, with Food Science and Engineering and Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management being the university's characteristic directions.
